update.title: Updates
update.upToDate: You are on the latest version.

dialog.title: A new version of Verko is available

debug.empty: No agent turns recorded yet. Send a message to start logging.

provider.title: Model provider
provider.rememberKey: Remember API key on this device
provider.rememberKeyHint: When off, the key stays in memory only and is forgotten on close.

chatgpt.title: Sign in with ChatGPT
chatgpt.description: Use your ChatGPT subscription instead of an API key. Opens openai.com in your browser.

addDialog.title: Add library
addDialog.description: Point to an existing folder. Verko will index it on first open.

welcome.title: Welcome to Verko
welcome.subtitle: Pick or create a paper library to get started. A library is a folder of Markdown files (local) or an S3-compatible bucket (online).
welcome.subtitleWeb: Connect an S3-compatible bucket to start. Local folders need the desktop app.
welcome.webNote: Web build runs the full agent against your S3 bucket — the desktop app adds local-folder libraries, OS keychain, and offline access.

openExisting.title: Open existing folder
openExisting.description: Choose a folder that already contains a Verko library, or one you'd like to convert.

createLocal.title: Create new local library
createLocal.description: Pick an empty folder. Verko will scaffold the layout.

connectS3.title: Connect S3 library
connectS3.description: Use an AWS S3, Cloudflare R2, Backblaze B2, or MinIO bucket as the storage backend.

namePrompt.title: Name this library
namePrompt.description: Used in the sidebar and library switcher. You can rename it later.
namePrompt.label: Display name

initPrompt.title: Initialize this folder?
initPrompt.message: This folder isn't a Verko library yet. We'll create papers/, attachments/, and schema.md inside it. Existing files won't be touched.

s3.title: Connect S3 library
s3.description: Verko writes one Markdown file per paper into the bucket. Credentials are stored encrypted on this machine.

fields.name: Display name
fields.endpointHint: Leave empty for AWS S3. Required for R2, B2, MinIO.
fields.prefixHint: Use this if multiple libraries share a bucket.

initPrompt.title: Initialize this bucket?
initPrompt.message: The bucket is reachable but has no schema.md. We'll write schema.md and an empty papers.csv to set it up as a Verko library.

errors.missing: Bucket, access key, and secret key are required.

deletePaper.title: Delete paper?
deletePaper.message: This removes the Markdown file and any attachments. The action cannot be undone.

importDialog.title: Import from arXiv
importDialog.description: Paste an arXiv URL or ID; we'll pull the title, authors, and year.

newColumn.title: New column
newColumn.description: Add a custom column to the schema. It appears in this view and the CSV index.
newColumn.name: Column name
newColumn.type: Type (text / number / date / bool / select / tags / url)

delete.title: Delete conversation?
delete.message: This permanently removes "{{title}}" and its messages.

paper.noNotes: No notes yet. Switch to Edit to add content.

command.label: Agent
command.papersHeading: Papers — tab to add as context

collectionDelete.title: Delete collection "{{name}}"?
collectionDelete.message: Papers in this collection will not be deleted, only the collection grouping.
